pricingDetail: Free to download and use for local development; App Store distribution requires an Apple Developer Program membership ($99/year).
description: The official integrated development environment for Apple platforms, providing a comprehensive suite of tools for building, testing, and distributing apps. It features deep integration with Apple's ecosystem, including powerful simulators, native AI coding assistance, and advanced performance analysis tools.
keyFeatures: AI Coding Intelligence with support for on-device models and third-party LLMs like ChatGPT and Claude
Predictive code completion and real-time SwiftUI Previews
Agentic coding tools that support request queuing and clarifying questions
bestFor: Native development for iOS, macOS, iPadOS, watchOS, tvOS, and visionOS.
notIdealFor: Cross-platform development for Android or Windows, or developers without a compatible Mac computer.
recentUpdates: Xcode 26.5 (May 2026) introduced agentic coding enhancements allowing AI assistants to queue messages and ask clarifying questions, alongside new StoreKit APIs for 12-month commitment billing.
verdict: The essential and highly optimized IDE for Apple developers, now modernizing the workflow with native AI integration and unified platform versioning.

name: JetBrains IDEs
pricingDetail: AI Free tier includes 3 monthly credits and unlimited local completion. AI Pro costs $10/mo (bundled with All Products Pack), and AI Ultimate is $30/mo for higher agent quotas.
description: A professional suite of IDEs with deeply integrated AI capabilities that leverage native semantic code analysis. The platform features the Junie autonomous agent and native support for switching between frontier models like GPT-5 and Claude 4.5.
keyFeatures: Junie Autonomous Agent for complex multi-file coding tasks
Multi-model support allowing mid-task switching between GPT-5, Claude 4.5, and Gemini 2.5
Deep context-awareness through the IDE's internal structural model of the codebase
bestFor: Professional developers in the JetBrains ecosystem who need high-precision AI assistance and autonomous agents that understand project-wide dependencies.
notIdealFor: Developers looking for a lightweight or purely open-source editor, or those who prefer a flat-rate unlimited model over a credit-based system.
recentUpdates: The May 2026 (v2026.1.2) release added the Skills Manager for agents, the ACP Agent Registry for third-party tools, and experimental proactive 'Recap' and 'Insights' features.
verdict: The most powerful high-context AI coding experience available for JetBrains users, particularly cost-effective for those already subscribing to the All Products Pack.

name: Visual Studio
pricingDetail: Free Community edition for individuals and small teams; Professional starts at ~$45/month; Enterprise starts at ~$250/month.
description: Microsoft's flagship integrated development environment (IDE) tailored for high-scale application development across web, cloud, and mobile. It offers deep native integration with GitHub Copilot and the .NET ecosystem, providing a heavy-duty suite of AI-assisted productivity tools for professional software engineers.
keyFeatures: GitHub Copilot Agent mode for autonomous refactoring, test generation, and multi-step coding tasks
AI-powered debugging suite featuring smart variable inspection and intelligent IEnumerable visualizers
Comprehensive project support for .NET 10, C++ 23/26, and cross-platform development with Hot Reload
bestFor: Enterprise developers and teams building complex, large-scale applications on the .NET or C++ stacks.
notIdealFor: Developers seeking a lightweight, low-resource editor for simple scripts or those working primarily on non-Windows operating systems.
recentUpdates: The 2026 release introduced agentic AI workflows, MCP server integration for external tools, and enhanced contextual AI completions for C# 14.
verdict: The premier IDE for professional Windows and enterprise development, now transformed into an agentic workspace through deep GitHub Copilot integration.
